zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Singleton of Broughton於1397年出生在英國藍卡爾布洛可爾斯時，他的父親Thomas de Singleton37歲，母親Elizabeth Brockholes32歲。他於1419年與Margaret Preston在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Singleton of Broughton于1397年出生在英国藍卡爾布洛可爾斯时，他的父亲Thomas de Singleton37岁，母亲Elizabeth Brockholes32岁。他于1419年与Margaret Preston在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Singleton of Broughton was born in 1397, in Brockholes, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas de Singleton, was 37 and his mother, Elizabeth Brockholes, was 32. He married Margaret Preston in 1419, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1474, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Singleton of Broughton est né en 1397, à Brockholes, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Singleton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Brockholes, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Preston en 1419, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1474, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Singleton of Broughton 1397 in Brockholes, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Singleton 37 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Brockholes 32. Er hat 1419 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Preston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1474 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Singleton of Broughton è nato il nel 1397 nel Brockholes, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Singleton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Brockholes, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Preston nel 1419, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1474, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Singleton of Broughtonが1397年にイギリスランカシュアイアブロックhオレスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Singletonは37歳，母Elizabeth Brockholesは32歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでMargaret Prestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Singleton of Broughton(이)가 1397년 영국 랭카실르 브록홀스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Singleton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Brockholes(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Margaret Preston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Singleton of Broughton nasceu em 1397, em Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Singleton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Brockholes, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Preston em 1419, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1474, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Singleton of Broughton родился в 1397 г. в местности броккхолесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Singleton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Brockholes, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Preston в 1419 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1474 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Singleton of Broughton nació en 1397, en Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Singleton, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Brockholes, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Preston en 1419, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1474, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
